records.v: Looks active. But keeping its eyes closed
Looks active; swimming in the trough inside the Estuary Landing; preening and scratching normally; hand feeding going on.
Looks active; doing preening and scratching. But still less appetite.
Eyes are closed and looks dull. Lost appetite.
Eyes are blinking frequently and keeping closed for 2-3 minutes. Standing at a same position facing wall. Didn’t come to feed.
Eyes are blinking frequently; sometimes keeping the eyes closed for 2-3 mins. Lost appetite and fed only one fish.
Looks competatively active. Observed standing and little movement. But did not come to hand feeding.
Looks inactive. Sitting at a same place for a long time.
Laid one egg. nIt was observed sitting at the same place since laying.
No bands, Moulting, no feathers, fatty
